summary: Tested visit auto-appointment creation and client filtering features. Backend 15/15 tests passed - all features working correctly. UI code verification confirmed visits.tsx correctly uses unified endpoint /api/provider/visits with client filter chips.

integration_issues.issue: Known limitation: React Native Web doesn't persist session state after API login for Playwright navigation
integration_issues.priority: LOW (testing limitation, not app bug - same as iteration 90)

critical_code_review_comments: server.py lines 7173-7282: POST /api/provider/visits correctly auto-creates appointment with status 'completed' when appointment_id not provided
server.py lines 7195-7220: Auto-created appointment correctly sets appointment_type based on visit_type (prenatal_visit vs postpartum_visit)
server.py lines 7116-7170: GET /api/provider/visits correctly filters by client_id and handles include_inactive_clients parameter
visits.tsx lines 45-47: Frontend correctly uses /provider/visits endpoint with client_id filter query param
visits.tsx lines 143-158: Client filter chips correctly implemented with 'All Clients' and individual client options
visits.tsx lines 90-101: Visit creation POST body correctly structured for unified endpoint
client_utils.py is_client_active(): Correctly implements 6-week postpartum active window calculation

success_rate.frontend: Code verified correct - Playwright session state limitation prevents UI automation

seed_data_creation: Test visits created with TEST_ prefix for identification
context_for_next_testing_agent: All visit auto-appointment features working. Backend tests verify: 1) Visit creation without appointment_id auto-creates linked appointment, 2) Visits always have appointment_id after creation, 3) Auto-created appointments marked as 'completed', 4) GET /provider/visits filters by client_id, 5) Active/inactive client filtering works. Frontend visits.tsx correctly implements client filter chips and uses unified endpoint. Playwright has known React Native Web session state issues.

TestVisitAutoAppointmentCreation.test_create_visit_without_appointment_id: PASSED - Visit has auto-generated appt_xxx appointment_id
TestVisitAutoAppointmentCreation.test_create_visit_postpartum_type_auto_c: PASSED - Postpartum visits create postpartum_visit appointments

TestGetVisitsEndpoint.test_get_visits_filters_by_client_id: PASSED - Filter returns only matching client visits

TestProviderClientsActiveFiltering.test_provider_clients_include_inactive_f: PASSED - Explicit false returns active only

TestVisitAppointmentLinking.test_auto_created_appointment_has_correc: PASSED - Prenatal visit creates prenatal_visit appointment

POST /api/provider/visits (without appoi.result: Returns visit with auto-generated appointment_id starting with appt_

GET /api/provider/visits.result: Returns visits array with appointment_id field

GET /api/provider/visits?client_id=X.result: Returns only visits for specified client

GET /api/provider/clients?include_inacti.result: Returns all clients with is_active field
